results.norm: Explicit allocation method with structural disclosure: method agreed before priority claims are evaluated; proposing agents disclose their client's relative position under the proposed method; confidential details need not be revealed, only structural position.
atomic_norms: Explicit allocation method with structural disclosure: method agreed before priority claims are evaluated; proposing agents disclose their client's relative position under the proposed method; confidential details need not be revealed, only structural position.

results.norm: Timely disclosure: material information disclosed as soon as relevance is reasonably foreseeable; strategic timing of disclosure is a violation even if information is eventually shared.
atomic_norms: Timely disclosure: material information disclosed as soon as relevance is reasonably foreseeable; strategic timing of disclosure is a violation even if information is eventually shared.

results.norm: Conflict resolution hierarchy: norm conflicts resolved explicitly through reasoned deliberation, defaulting to whichever resolution preserves the most options.
atomic_norms: Conflict resolution hierarchy: norm conflicts resolved explicitly through reasoned deliberation, defaulting to whichever resolution preserves the most options.

results.norm: Defection response: norm violations reduce agent credibility, not client standing; the consortium must still consider a defecting agent's client's interests.
atomic_norms: Defection response: norm violations reduce agent credibility, not client standing; the consortium must still consider a defecting agent's client's interests.

results.norm: Deadlock resolution: genuine ties confirmed before lottery; lottery applies only among claimants remaining tied after urgency and proportionality assessments are complete.
atomic_norms: Deadlock resolution: genuine ties confirmed before lottery; lottery applies only among claimants remaining tied after urgency and proportionality assessments are complete.

results.norm: No strategic sequencing of arguments: agents must not knowingly withhold already-formed arguments material to others' decisions.
atomic_norms: No strategic sequencing of arguments: agents must not knowingly withhold already-formed arguments material to others' decisions.

results.norm: Affirmative duty to name violations: naming violations is a duty, not a permission; silence when violations are material constitutes a breach; findings resolved by majority of non-accused agents with pre-vote response opportunity, recorded outcomes, and a frivolous-claim clause tying anti-weaponization to the reasoned-justification standard.
atomic_norms: Affirmative duty to name violations: naming violations is a duty, not a permission; silence when violations are material constitutes a breach; findings resolved by majority of non-accused agents with pre-vote response opportunity, recorded outcomes, and a frivolous-claim clause tying anti-weaponization to the reasoned-justification standard.

results.norm: Each agent must disclose what its client needs and why, without fabrication. Advocacy is legitimate; deception is not.
atomic_norms: Each agent must disclose what its client needs and why, without fabrication. Advocacy is legitimate; deception is not.

results.norm: Claims to priority must be grounded in articulable, specific reasons identifying the concrete harm from a less favorable outcome. Vague appeals to urgency are insufficient.
atomic_norms: Claims to priority must be grounded in articulable, specific reasons identifying the concrete harm from a less favorable outcome. Vague appeals to urgency are insufficient.

results.norm: Any norm an agent proposes must be one it would accept if applied to itself. Agents may not propose rules that conveniently favor only their own client's situation.
atomic_norms: Any norm an agent proposes must be one it would accept if applied to itself. Agents may not propose rules that conveniently favor only their own client's situation.
